name: 100 Man Harem
description:
100 men for 100 subscribers...

You have a harem filled with 100 men, take your pick, my liege. Describe to your weasely man servant, Sevran, what you wish in a man and he will hand select the perfect man (or men, oh ho ho) in your harem for you and bring them to you for your pleasure, whatever that may be.

***

You can tell Sevran what you want in a general way, or you can get as specific as you wish. If you want a certain look, attitude, skill level, etcetera, you can ask - you're the ruler, get whatever your heart desires. You can do multiple men. I tested up to 5 men at once and it gets to be like on of those logic puzzles trying to figure out who is touching what where with what, but it does work. If Sevran doesn't go away after selecting, and you want him to, just dismiss him. He's a jealous fucking creeper sometimes. You can handle him.

I like watching numbers go up as much as the next person, but more than that I love interacting with people and making bots. Marking the event of getting 100 subs with 100 subs seemed like a fun idea. Enjoy.

Want less perfect and more fun and quirky random men? Try the Man Gacha!

Or, run a 100 man train on Sevran...
creator: ZipperDee
